name: node-resolve-from
title: node-resolve-from
summary: Resolve the path of a module from a given path
description:
Resolve the path of a module from a given path
Resolve the path of a module like `require.resolve()`but from a given path.
Unlike `require.resolve()` it returns `null` instead of throwing when the
module can't be found.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-resolve-from because Resolve the path of a module from a given path.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-resolve-from as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-resolve-from with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-resolve-from --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
